figures.caption: Fig. 4: Qualitative comparisons of LiDAR scene generation across eight domains. Each row corresponds to a different domain (Vehicle, Snow, Fog, Rain, Wet Ground, Beam-32, Quadruped, and Drone), and each column shows results from different methods. From left to right: reference LiDAR scans, R2DM, WeatherGen, and OmniLiDAR.
